acceptance_dimensions.name: methodology_rigor
acceptance_dimensions.description: Study design, data handling, statistical reporting, and reproducibility affordances meet the field's peer-review bar.

acceptance_dimensions.name: domain_accuracy
acceptance_dimensions.description: Claims align with current domain evidence; prior work is correctly represented; no factual errors in domain-specific terminology or results.

acceptance_dimensions.name: argumentative_coherence
acceptance_dimensions.description: Core thesis is internally consistent; evidence supports claims; no fallacies that undermine the central argument.

acceptance_dimensions.name: cross_disciplinary_relevance
acceptance_dimensions.description: Framing, definitions, and implications are accessible to adjacent-field readers; interdisciplinary claims are substantiated.

acceptance_dimensions.name: writing_and_structure
acceptance_dimensions.description: Manuscript organisation, clarity of exposition, figure/table quality, and adherence to venue conventions.

failure_conditions.expression: two or more mandatory dimensions score 'warn' or worse
